About

I / VI
◆

A Problem Manager and AI Operations specialist with close to five years across IT operations, problem management, incident lifecycle and process automation — currently owning the end-to-end problem management practice for a Fortune 500 global logistics enterprise at Accenture.

I lead Major Incident Reviews with global stakeholders, maintain the SLA dashboards senior leadership reads every week, and engineer GenAI and automation tooling that removes repetitive work from daily operations. Alongside full-time work, I'm pursuing an MBA in Supply Chain & Operations Management.

Experience

III / VI
MMXXIV — PRESENT
Bengaluru

Problem Manager — AI Operations

ACCENTURE · FORTUNE 500 GLOBAL LOGISTICS ENTERPRISE
  • ·Own the end-to-end problem management practice — every record from initial logging through root-cause investigation, corrective-action tracking and formal closure.
  • ·Lead Major Incident Reviews with global stakeholders — preparation, facilitation, root-cause narrative, CAPA assignment and Minutes of Meeting.
  • ·Apply 5-Whys and Fishbone analysis to every major incident to reach the actual cause, not the surface symptom — then brief business owners on recurring patterns before they escalate.
  • ·Engineer AI-assisted workflows and prompt-driven tooling that remove repetitive effort from daily operations and raise the quality of operational output.
  • ·Build daily, weekly and bi-weekly Power BI dashboards on SLA performance and incident trends — with DAX threshold alerts that flag risk before a breach — reviewed by senior leadership.
MMXXI — MMXXIV
Bengaluru

Business Reporting Analyst

TATA CONSULTANCY SERVICES
  • ·Built and maintained Power BI dashboards for ten global clients across retail, consumer goods and banking — covering SLA monitoring and weekly KPI reporting reviewed by stakeholders.
  • ·Automated weekly and monthly reporting with Python and Excel, removing hours of manual steps from every cycle.
  • ·Validated every dataset before stakeholder delivery and translated business requirements into dashboards that evolved with the need.

Projects

IV / VI
OPEN SOURCE · VIEW ON GITHUB ↗
P·I

AI-Powered Incident
RCA Assistant

Takes an incident report — Excel, PDF or raw text — and produces a complete RCA document in seven steps: impact assessment, 5-Whys root cause, contributing factors, corrective actions, lessons learned and an executive summary. It searches a database of past incidents first, so output reflects real history rather than a generic answer. Built end-to-end with prompt engineering and Claude Code; deployed on Render with Docker and used in daily work.

LangGraphChromaDBFastAPIAzure OpenAIPostgreSQLDocker
OPERATIONS & LEADERSHIP REPORTING
P·II

Power BI Operational
Reporting Suite

A dashboard suite covering daily incident counts, weekly SLA results and bi-weekly operational summaries for enterprise operations and leadership teams. DAX measures handle trend spotting, threshold alerts and filtering by team, category and time — so operations teams see problems forming early instead of reacting after the fact.
